title: Why Etsy, Best Buy And GameStop Shares Are Trading Lower Today
text: Shares of several retail and apparel stocks, including Etsy Inc (NASDAQ: ETSY), Best Buy Co Inc (NYSE: BBY) and GameStop Corp (NYSE: GME), are trading lower Friday following data showing a drop in U.S. retail sales. Retail sales fell by 1.9% in December, declining much more than the estimates for a 0.1% drop.

title: Target Holiday Footfall Increases Beat Walmart, Best Buy
text: While Target will not be reporting fourth quarter earnings until March 3, it appears that store footfall fell their way in the final weeks of the holiday shopping season.

title: Target holiday shopper traffic growth topped Walmart, Best Buy -data
text: Shopper foot traffic grew at Target during the recent holiday season compared with two years earlier, while visits to both Walmart and Best Buy stores fell overall, according to data provided exclusively to Reuters measuring shopper visits from Nov. 1 to Dec. 25.
